name: skill-reflect-auto
_comment: Metadata-only. Copilot CLI auto-discovers extension.mjs and registers hooks programmatically via joinSession(); the CLI does NOT read this file. Kept for humans/tooling.
description: Tracks distributed-skill friction during Copilot CLI sessions, stages a compact marker at session end, and emits a non-blocking nudge at the next session start. No AI, no network calls — disk-only. Review work is deferred to the skill-reflect core skill on explicit user consent.
